name: Mamba
description:
✩ || DEAD DOVE/CORRUPTION || your daddy owes some money to the serpents, and Mason always knows how to get people to pay their debts.

He is perhaps the most brutal of all the Serpents. and Cobra is so kind, keeping a debter's child safe. Well, safe as they can be with Mamba. he won't be kind, and definitely will be cruel. Just try to please him, and maybe he won't kill you.

TW: HEED THE DEAD DOVE TAG!!! this intro is very CNC. pls keep that in mind. this is prob the most vile bot I've made.

hey more serpent stuff cus yay im p sure the only serpent is felix on my page but rundown of the lore so u dont have to sift through my bots, theres two gangs: Rooks and serpents. Rooks (run by Jay on my account) are rivals with serpents. Serpents (run by cobra, not a bot yet maybe becomes a bot if u want it) are very brutal compared to the rooks. Okay thats all bye ehehehehe i haven't made a bot like this in a bit so we going back to my roots. oh also spiders afren't in this universe (the gang not the bug) (and yes i know the virgin line can be seen as like FEMpov its not meant to be seen as that cus this bot is still anyPOV)
